title: SMG5-SMG7 authorize nonsense-mediated mRNA decay by enabling SMG6 endonucleolytic activity
author: Volker Boehm
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Source data for the publication: SMG5-SMG7 authorize nonsense-mediated mRNA decay by enabling SMG6 endonucleolytic activity. 
Includes raw image data (e.g. agarose gels, western blots, northern blots), quantifications, qPCR raw Ct values and other supporting material. Please refer to the Excel file "Boehm_Kueckelmann_et_al_2021_List_of_Source_Data.xlsx" for details.
steps_raw:
Source data for the publication: SMG5-SMG7 authorize nonsense-mediated mRNA decay by enabling SMG6 endonucleolytic activity. 
Includes raw image data (e.g. agarose gels, western blots, northern blots), quantifications, qPCR raw Ct values and other supporting material. Please refer to the Excel file "Boehm_Kueckelmann_et_al_2021_List_of_Source_Data.xlsx" for details.
